original_image_tags: A dark, green-tinted copy of a typewritten affidavit on official letterhead. The top of the page is stamped "CONFIDENTIAL" with two punch holes. A "COPY" stamp is in the upper right corner. The bottom of the page is also stamped "CONFIDENTIAL". There is a red "X" mark over the signature line for "John Paul Strapp".

elements.description: A typed affidavit page from the State of California, County of Kern, dated 12 August 1947. It contains typed text describing an observation of an oval object by Captain John Paul Strapp. The page includes the words 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamped at the top and bottom, and 'COPY' stamped in the top right corner. There are two punch holes at the top. No photographs, sketches, or diagrams are present.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on all visual elements (stamps 'CONFIDENTIAL' top/bottom, 'COPY' top right, two punch holes, red 'X' over signature line, no photographs/sketches/diagrams), and all quoted text ('CONFIDENTIAL', 'COPY') matches.
